books.title: The Manhunter Series
books.author: L.J. Martin
books.blurb:
The Manhunter Series

Dev Shannon lives the good life, on a boat in Santa Barbara harbor, but he pays dearly from time to time, as he's one of America's finest man-hunters, a bounty hunter...and there's plenty of customers out there to hook up and haul in. Dev Shannon loves his job. He makes good money, travels everywhere, meets interesting people, and drags them off in chains to face justice.

The Manhunter Series Boxset includes Crimson Hit, Bullet Blues, and Quiet Ops.
books.description: The Manhunter Series by L.J. Martin follows Dev Shannon, a Santa Barbara bounty hunter who makes his living tracking fugitives, hauling them back in chains, and calling it justice.

books.title: The Penetrator Series Box Set: Books 1-10
books.author: Chet Cunningham
books.blurb:
TEN ACTION-PACKED NOVELS FROM THE HARDBOILED PULP THRILLER SERIES, THE PENETRATOR.

Mark Hardin is known by his enemies as The Penetrator. He's part Cheyenne, and he's never forgotten his past.

In quest of his heritage, Mark learned how to track a man—but never leave tracks—and ways in which to speak his native language in ancient dialects and sign language. His years of army service in Vietnam taught him other things, too. He's a sharpshooter with almost any weapon a man can hold, an expert with hand grenades, explosives, booby traps, and line mines, as well as a black belt in karate and aikido.

Mark knows how to kill. But he also knows how to stay alive.

As a child, he bounced from orphanages to foster homes and grew up with parents as diverse as Mafia Dons, Irish policemen, and college professors. He's seen all angles of life. Which is exactly why Mark knows evil all too well—and vows to eradicate it every chance he gets.

Join the unyielding journey of The Penetrator as he harnesses his unique skills and unbreakable spirit to combat darkness in this thrilling crime fiction collection today!

The Penetrator Series: Books 1-10 includes The Target H, Blood on the Strip, Capitol Hell, Hijacking Manhattan, Mardi Gras Massacre, Tokyo Purple, Baja Banditos, Northwest Contract, Dodge City Bombers, and The Hellbomb Flight.
books.description: The Penetrator Series Box Set: Books 1-10 by Chet Cunningham follows Mark Hardin, the Cheyenne-trained Penetrator, from Vietnam-honed combat skills into ten hardboiled pulp thriller missions against evil.
anchors_extracted: TEN ACTION-PACKED NOVELS FROM THE HARDBOILED PULP THRILLER SERIES

books.title: Gunpowder Mountain
books.author: Jarrett Keene
books.blurb:
Gunpowder Mountain (Kid Crimson 1)Book Blurb

COVER COPY / WEBSITE / INGRAM LISTING

Step into the 1860’s Wild West with Gunpowder Mountain, the thrilling first installment of the new Kid Crimson western series.

Join Kid Crimson as he flees his abusive past, navigating the treacherous landscapes of the Confederate South to find refuge in the bustling boomtown of Virginia City, Nevada.

As the youngest and most ruthless hired gun in town, Kid faces off against brutal gangs, all while capturing the attention of the town's loveliest saloon girls. But Kid's life takes a dangerous turn when he uncovers a Confederate plot to assassinate President Abraham Lincoln during his secret visit to Nevada—a conspiracy that involves a hydrogen machine, air balloons, a mountain of gunpowder, explosive-sniffing hogs, and even a poisoned stew.

Caught between two women vying for his affection and a looming miner's revolt, Kid Crimson must navigate a perilous path to keep Lincoln safe and secure his own future.

Violent, sensual, and darkly comical, Gunpowder Mountain is a journey into history that will live far into the future.

AMAZON BLURB

Step into the 1860’s Wild West with Gunpowder Mountain, the thrilling first installment of the new Kid Crimson western series.

Join Kid Crimson as he flees his abusive past, navigating the treacherous landscapes of the Confederate South to find refuge in the bustling boomtown of Virginia City, Nevada.

As the youngest and most ruthless hired gun in town, Kid faces off against brutal gangs, all while capturing the attention of the town's loveliest saloon girls. But Kid's life takes a dangerous turn when he uncovers a Confederate plot to assassinate President Abraham Lincoln during his secret visit to Nevada—a conspiracy that involves a hydrogen machine, air balloons, a mountain of gunpowder, explosive-sniffing hogs, and even a poisoned stew.

Caught between two women vying for his affection and a looming miner's revolt, Kid Crimson must navigate a perilous path to keep Lincoln safe and secure his own future.

Violent, sensual, and darkly comical, Gunpowder Mountain is a journey into history that will live far into the future. Don't miss out—grab your copy now!

COVER TAGLINE

“[Keene] is one hell of a writer.” —Peter Brandvold, author of the Sheriff Ben Stillman series

In a town ruled by money and death, Kid Crimson is the embodiment of handsome vengeance—loved by women and feared by men.

PRAISE for Gunpowder Mountain

“[Keene] is one hell of a writer.” —Peter Brandvold, author of the Sheriff Ben Stillman series

“Packed with gritty action, Gunpowder Mountain is a pulse-pounding potboiler that also happens to be a very fine novel. Keene's taut and gutsy prose at once honors and renews the conventions of the Western genre, bringing to mind masters like Elmore Leonard, John Jakes and Walter Van Tilburg Clark. Sustained excellence from cover to cover.” –Stephen B. Armstrong, author of I Want You Around: The Ramones and the Making of Rock 'n' Roll High School

“Keene is a masterful writer of dialog and a superb weaver of tales crafted, I am convinced, with a slight smirk on his face. Gunpowder is rich in authentic and impressive detail, a product of the author’s steadfast penchant for research.” —Steve Bornhoft, Professor, Journalist, Communication Professional

PRAISE for Jarrett Keene’s HAMMER OF THE DOGS

“Masterfully capturing the anxiety of younger generations faced with inheriting (and fixing) a world they might not even want, the novel is relatable for Gen Z’ers like me, who are staring down the barrel of a future that feels increasingly desperate. Does Lash live up to Keene’s promise of being a ‘kickass heroine for the 21st century’? If that entails protecting loved ones, fighting for justice, and growing through trauma, then yes. And, as my generation knows, she’s long overdue.” –Anne Davis, Nevada Public Radio, Desert Companion

“Hammer of the Dogs by Jarret Keene succeeds on several levels: as a thriller; as social commentary on issues including the hoarding and concentration of wealth and resources; as a jab at corporate religion; as a humorous work that unites disparate elements like Zippo lighters and warbots; and as a vehicle for Lash, replete with her exaggerated secondary sexual characteristics and possessed of the strength of both man and machine.” —Tallahassee Magazine

“A thrilling adventure starring an unforgettable warrior.” —Peter Telep, author of Tom Clancy’s EndWar: The Missing

“A dozen years after The Hunger Games and Divergent were first published, Hammer of the Dogs lights Las Vegas aflame with a post-apocalyptic fury, in which a new generation must reclaim the world from those who ruined it.” —Todd Pierce, author of The Australia Stories

“Lash, the heroine of Jarret Keene’s post-apocalyptic Hammer of the Dogs, is a mix of Katniss Everdeen, Tris Prior, and Lisbeth Salander with an arsenal of deadly drones and ‘bombots’ worthy of a Tom Clancy novel. Lash was ‘born to slaughter evil’ and she’s very good at her job. What bleeds in Vegas won’t remain in Vegas for long.” —Pat Rushin, screenwriter of The Zero Theorem
books.description: Gunpowder Mountain by Jarrett Keene follows Kid Crimson from the Confederate South to Virginia City, Nevada, where a plot against Abraham Lincoln turns the mountain, the boomtown, and every hired gun dangerous.
anchors_extracted: John Jakes and Walter Van Tilburg Clark. Sustained

books.title: Harrison Wilke: A Classic Western Collection
books.author: Frank Roderus
books.blurb_source: gdrive://16a8E7H5pmVePmvWJHr3uUIRXHb9_3u8j/Book Blurb -- Harrison Wilke: A Classic Western Collection.docx
books.blurb:
Harrison Wilke:

A Classic Western Collection

Book Blurb

COVER COPY / WEBSITE / INGRAM LISTING

N/A e-book only

AMAZON BLURB

AN UNFORGETTABLE WESTERN JOURNEY ACROSS THE FRONTIER.

Step into the boots of Harrison Wilke, a man caught between the rugged traditions of the Old West and the dawn of a modern frontier, in this spellbinding collection of three classic Western tales.

Leaving KansasHarrison Wilke is a man of refinement and conviction in a world that values strength over subtlety. When family obligations force him back to Kansas, he must navigate dusty trails, untamed tempers, and his own inner conflicts. Can a man who yearns for civility carve out a place in the wild?

Reaching ColoradoChasing a dream of prosperity and class, Harrison embarks on a journey to Colorado Springs, only to find himself tested by treachery, temptation, and unexpected alliances. As he learns to survive the untamed frontier, Harrison discovers that character is forged in the fires of adversity.

Finding NevadaYears after leaving his rough beginnings behind, Harrison is drawn back to the West when an old friend’s legacy lands him in Nevada. With enemies closing in and his own past haunting him, he faces his greatest challenge yet: protecting his friend’s dream while proving his own worth in a lawless land.

In Harrison Wilke: A Classic Western Collection, Frank Roderus masterfully brings to life the shifting tides of the American West, where men confront their fates, and the true cost of honor is revealed at every turn.

COVER TAGLINE

Three Tales of Grit, Growth, and the Untamed Wild.

books.title: Nash Walker: Feud on the Frontier
books.author: Patrick Lindsay
books.blurb_source: gdrive://19E2ju9Fya26pA3k_YYG0Y3p9hujys9XLIkwcRUeszgA/Book Blurb -- Nash Walker: Feud on the Frontier
books.blurb:
﻿Nash Walker: Feud on the Frontier
(Nash Walker 1)
Book Blurb


PBK COVER COPY / WEBSITE / INGRAM LISTING
He came to Texas to outrun his past. What he found was a war he couldn't walk away from.
In the rugged aftermath of heartbreak, Nash Walker, a hardened moonshiner from the hills of Tennessee, rides west with nothing left to lose. Texas offers a chance at redemption—or ruin. From bounty hunter to reluctant Texas Ranger, Nash is soon swept into the bloody Sutton-Taylor feud, one of the deadliest range wars in frontier history.
When an enchanting singer named Victoria pleads for help protecting her family's land from a ruthless neighbor and his gang of hired guns, Nash can't turn his back. With bullets flying and loyalties tested, he’ll need the grit of a frontiersman, the law of a Ranger, and the backing of cattle baron Charles Goodnight to survive.
Will Nash find peace on the Texas frontier, or will this new fight cost him everything he has left?


AMAZON BLURB


He came to Texas to outrun his past. What he found was a war he couldn't walk away from.
In the rugged aftermath of heartbreak, Nash Walker, a hardened moonshiner from the hills of Tennessee, rides west with nothing left to lose. Texas offers a chance at redemption—or ruin. From bounty hunter to reluctant Texas Ranger, Nash is soon swept into the bloody Sutton-Taylor feud, one of the deadliest range wars in frontier history.
When an enchanting singer named Victoria pleads for help protecting her family's land from a ruthless neighbor and his gang of hired guns, Nash can't turn his back. With bullets flying and loyalties tested, he’ll need the grit of a frontiersman, the law of a Ranger, and the backing of cattle baron Charles Goodnight to survive.
Will Nash find peace on the Texas frontier, or will this new fight cost him everything he has left?
Read Nash Walker: Feud on the Frontier now and ride into the heart of the Old West—where every feud is personal, and every choice could be your last.




COVER TAGLINE


In Texas, the only law is lead.
books.description: Nash Walker: Feud on the Frontier by Patrick Lindsay sends a Tennessee moonshiner into Texas, where Victoria, the Sutton-Taylor feud, and Charles Goodnight pull him toward a Ranger's fight he cannot walk away from.

books.title: People of the Owl
books.author: W. Michale Gear and Kathleen O'Neal Gear
books.blurb:
People of the Owl: The Earliest Americans Book One

Book Blurb

COVER COPY / WEBSITE / INGRAM LISTING

New York Times bestselling authors W. Michael Gear and Kathleen O’Neal Gear masterfully bring to life an ancient America, long forgotten in the mists of time, yet strikingly relevant in today’s world.

Four Thousand years ago, in the lower Mississippi Valley, a civilization thrived that would lay the foundations of the great Indian Nations.  In a long-lost land of forests, swamps, and hidden waterways, A boy is thrust into leadership of America's first city, forced to become a man before his time.

Salamander, only fifteen winters old, would rather chase crickets and marvel at blue herons than navigate the treacherous politics of his clan. But when his revered brother is slain, Salamander is thrust into the role of leader in what will one day be known as the American South's first city.

Burdened with the legacy of his brother’s two wives—who despise him—and a marriage to the daughter of his mortal enemy, Salamander must forge alliances to secure the trade goods his people need to survive. Yet, in a world where enemies lurk in every shadow, and assassins strike without warning, Salamander must grow from boy to man, and from a reluctant leader to a formidable one.

Can Salamander navigate the brutal landscape of ancient politics and emerge as the leader his people need? Or will the passions of the human heart devour him before he can claim his destiny?

AMAZON BLURB

New York Times bestselling authors W. Michael Gear and Kathleen O’Neal Gear masterfully bring to life an ancient America, long forgotten in the mists of time, yet strikingly relevant in today’s world.

Four Thousand years ago, in the lower Mississippi Valley, a civilization thrived that would lay the foundations of the great Indian Nations.  In a long-lost land of forests, swamps, and hidden waterways, A boy is thrust into leadership of America's first city, forced to become a man before his time.

Burdened with the legacy of his brother’s two wives—who despise him—and a marriage to the daughter of his mortal enemy, Salamander must forge alliances to secure the trade goods his people need to survive. Yet, in a world where enemies lurk in every shadow, and assassins strike without warning, Salamander must grow from boy to man, and from a reluctant leader to a formidable one.

Can Salamander navigate the brutal landscape of ancient politics and emerge as the leader his people need? Or will the passions of the human heart devour him before he can claim his destiny?

Step into the epic saga of America's first city—an untold history where legend is born. Discover the beginning of this thrilling historical fantasy series today!

COVER TAGLINE

“Extraordinary…a captivating story replete with romance, intrigue, mayhem, and a nail-biting climax.” –Library Journal

PRAISE

“Extraordinary…Once again, the authors colorfully integrate authentic archaeological and anthropological details with a captivating story replete with romance, intrigue, mayhem, and a nail-biting climax.” –Library Journal

“It is fascinating to see how much like us these early tribesmen, and that the more things change, the more they stay the same.” –Romantic Times (4 Stars)
books.description: People of the Owl by W. Michale Gear and Kathleen O'Neal Gear moves with a watchful, night-dark tension, blending frontier grit, outlaw pressure, and the uneasy silence before violence breaks.

books.title: The Peter Brandvold Intro Library
books.author: Peter Brandvold
books.blurb:
BESTSELLING AUTHOR “MEAN PETE” BRANDVOLD HAS BEEN SPINNING CLASSIC, ACTION-FILLED WESTERN YARNS FOR THE PAST TWENTY-FIVE YEARS.

In this Introductory Library, readers will find the first book from each of Peter Brandvold’s eight bestselling, fan favorite series—offering a mere taste of the smorgasbord served up by the wester-writing legend himself.

Sheriff Ben Stillman Series

Playing poker, smoking cigarettes, and drinking whiskey—retirement is treacherous business for ex-lawman Ben Stillman. But when the past comes looking for him, can the worn-out old lawman live up to the legendary lawman he once was?

.45 Caliber Series

Cuno Massey's thirst for revenge runs deep. Deeper than his skills. But when Rolf Anderson and Sammy Spoon kill his stepmother and father, nothing will stand in his way. He’ll even ride straight through hell for the bittersweet taste of revenge.

Yakima Henry Series

Half Indian and half white, Yakima Henry considers himself lucky to have any job—even if it means sweeping up the local brothel. But when four hombres attempt to carve up one of the house girls, Yakima gives them a taste of their own medicine with his Arkansas Toothpick. Now, he's the girl's protector and on the run from a vicious bounty hunter.

Colter Farrow Saga

Colter Farrow may be young, but ever since his stepfather was savagely murdered, his blood has boiled with a rage as great as any man’s. While trying to exact revenge, Colter ends up on the run from bounty hunters, outlaws, and a sadistic sheriff.

Lou Prophet Series

Lou Prophet’s life as a bounty hunter has taught him one rule—you don't stop riding ‘till the job is finished. Repeatedly caught in bloody crossfires and determined to show outlaws that justice doesn’t always wear a badge, Lou faces seemingly insurmountable odds at every turn.

The Revenger Series

Mike Sartain “The Revenger” grew up in the French Quarter of New Orleans where he was taught how to fight by some of the toughest, meanest SOBs in any port. He was taught how to love by some of the most beautiful women in the world. Now, The Revenger rides for anyone who has an ax to grind.

Rogue Lawman Series

Deputy U.S. Marshal Gideon Hawk was respected throughout the Territory as a lawman of principle—until Three Fingers Ned Meade threw him a curve. When Meade killed Hawk's ten-year-old boy, the grisly act drove Hawk's grief-stricken wife to hang herself. Now, robbed of kin, Hawk sets out on a brutal quest to find the man responsible—at any cost.

Bloody Joe Mannion Series

“Bloody” Joe Mannion is a town tamer of great renown. His temper is just as famous. Known as the most uncompromising lawman on the Western frontier, he’s been the town marshal of Del Norte in the Colorado Territory for the past five years. Now, Bloody Joe is willing to risk everything—including his life, the town, and a hail of hot lead.

Dive into this one-of-kind Western collection today! The following titles are included:

Once a Marshal (Sheriff Ben Stillman 1)

.45 Caliber Revenge (.45 Caliber 1)

The Lonely Breed (Yakima Henry 1)

The Guns of Sapinero (Colter Farrow Saga 1)

The Devil and Lou Prophet (Lou Prophet 1)

A Bullet for Sartain (The Revenger 1)

Rogue Lawman (Rogue Lawman 1)

Bloody Joe (Bloody Joe Mannion 1)
books.description: The Peter Brandvold Intro Library by Peter Brandvold gathers frontier grit, gunslinger tension, and outlaw heat into a hard-riding Western entry point where lawmen, cowboys, rifles, and revolvers carry the weight.

books.title: A Dark Reflection
books.author: Michael A Black
books.blurb:
A Dark Reflection

INGRAM/PAPERBACK/WEBSITE

Serial Killer Thrillers don’t get darker than this…

Twenty-eight years ago, Detective Roger Colby put Morgan Laird—a sadistic killer with a trail of mutilated victims—behind bars for life. Case closed, justice was served. Or so Colby thought.

Now, the unthinkable has happened: Laird is free. Paroled, wheelchair-bound, and Harmless...or so they say.

But as a chilling string of new murders begin, each echoing Laird’s original signature, Colby is pulled back into a nightmare he thought he’d buried. DNA evidence screams Laird’s involvement, yet the system insists he’s reformed, and the federal task force dismisses Colby’s suspicions. Alone and out of favor, he’s forced to chase a new kind of killer—one who hides behind masks, misdirection, and the belief that justice is blind.

Is Morgan Laird back to finish what he started, or has someone else picked up the knife?

With each brutal death, the line between past and present blurs. And for Colby, redemption may lie in stopping a killer who’s always one step ahead.

AMAZON

Serial Killer Thrillers don’t get darker than this…

Twenty-eight years ago, Detective Roger Colby put Morgan Laird—a sadistic killer with a trail of mutilated victims—behind bars for life. Case closed, justice was served. Or so Colby thought.

Now, the unthinkable has happened: Laird is free. Paroled, wheelchair-bound, and Harmless...or so they say.

But as a chilling string of new murders begin, each echoing Laird’s original signature, Colby is pulled back into a nightmare he thought he’d buried. DNA evidence screams Laird’s involvement, yet the system insists he’s reformed, and the federal task force dismisses Colby’s suspicions. Alone and out of favor, he’s forced to chase a new kind of killer—one who hides behind masks, misdirection, and the belief that justice is blind.

Is Morgan Laird back to finish what he started, or has someone else picked up the knife?

With each brutal death, the line between past and present blurs. And for Colby, redemption may lie in stopping a killer who’s always one step ahead.

A gripping standalone for fans of Silence of the Lambs and True Detective. If you love dark, twist-filled Crime Thrillers with a pulse-pounding pace, pick up your copy now—before the next body drops.

Tagline: Serial Killer Thrillers don’t get darker than this…

Original from author:

Detective Roger Colby thought he ended serial killer Morgan Laird’s murderous killing spree twenty-eight-years before when Laird was sentenced to spend the rest of his life in prison. But now a dark reflection haunts him as Colby soon finds out that nothing is certain in today’s ever-changing society. The wheelchair-bound Laird has been released from prison and granted parole—something that the court said would never happen. So is it coincidence that a series of new homicides has suddenly begun, identically mirroring Laird’s brutal series of past murders? As Colby reluctantly joins a federal task force investigating these new crimes, he begins to uncover a sinister plot so unthinkable that it virtually defies belief. When Morgan Laird’s DNA is recovered from the scene of one of the recent murders, Colby realizes that the unthinkable has suddenly become reality. Shunned by the task force, and without support for his conjectures, Colby knows he must trace this new blood trail to its source and bring these brutal copycat crimes to a halt, regardless of the consequences.
books.description: A Dark Reflection by Michael A Black pulls Detective Roger Colby back toward Morgan Laird, the killer he thought was locked away for life, when new murders begin echoing the old case with brutal precision.

books.title: The Complete Jake Caldwell Thriller Collection
books.author: James L. Weaver
books.blurb_source: gdrive://1DNdyuVjKnhgnTEtrpIja8NxAVWdB18tx/blurb -- The Complete Jake Caldwell Thriller Collection.docx
books.blurb:
The Complete Jake Caldwell Thriller CollectionBook blurb

WEBSITE

Once you start running, it's hard to stop…

Step into the gritty, high-stakes world of ex-mob enforcer Jake Caldwell in The Complete Jake Caldwell Thriller Collection. This electrifying seven-book series by award-nominated author James L. Weaver is a must-read for fans of Jack Reacher, The Prey Series, and The Gray Man.

From his dark past as a mafia leg-breaker to his relentless pursuit of justice as a private investigator, Jake’s journey is one of redemption, deadly secrets, and explosive action. Each book is a non-stop thrill ride, packed with gripping suspense, brutal enemies, and shocking twists that will keep you turning pages late into the night.

Why Readers Love This Collection:

Unforgettable action sequences and high-stakes investigations

A tough yet deeply human protagonist fighting for redemption

Gritty crime stories with shocking twists and emotional depth

Perfect for fans of Lee Child, John Sandford, and David Baldacci

The Complete Jake Caldwell Thriller Collection includes all seven heart-pounding novels:

Poor Boy Road – Jake Caldwell returns to his hometown to settle a score, but the past won’t let him go

Ares Road – A missing girl, a brutal conspiracy, and a silver briefcase with deadly secrets

Blackbird Road – A kidnapped child, a desperate chase, and a shocking betrayal

Asylum Road – A vengeful drug lord escapes prison, and the hunt turns personal

Husker Road – A college visit takes a deadly turn when Jake is forced into a ruthless cartel war

Anarchy Road – A devastating bombing reveals a twisted plan to tear the country apart

Last Chance Road – A missing woman. A deadly pattern. A race against time.

books.title: Lars & Shaine: The Complete Series
books.author: Eric Beetner
books.blurb_source: gdrive://1_Lh5OccByBNtjcnPKPiR6S3gGZ4coAD4/Book Blurb -- Lars and Shaine The Complete Series by Eric Beetner.docx
books.blurb:
Lars and Shaine: The Complete Series

Book Blurb

JOIN LARS AND SHAINE AS THEY TRAVERSE THE MEANING OF FAMILY AND ATTEMPT TO UNDO YEARS OF VIOLENCE IN THIS ACTION-PACKED CRIME THRILLER.

In The Devil Doesn’t Want Me, Lars—a hitman for an East Coast crime family—is on the hunt for Mitch the Snitch, an accountant who turned on Lars’ employer almost two decades ago. But when a young gun is sent in to replace Lars’ old boss, Lars loses the desire to kill his long-time target. Too bad leaving the game isn’t an easy feat, and—soon—Lars finds himself on the run with Mitch’s teenage daughter, Shaine, trying like hell to stay one step ahead of angry mobsters and the FBI.

When the Devil Comes to Call follows Lars and Shaine two years after they escaped the mainland with their lives and little else—having carved out a nicely spartan existence in Hawaii. What befalls is a coming of age forged in fire and a deepening bond built on the edge of life and death. Forced to confront the past and wonder about the future, Lars and Shaine are about to see what kind of team they make.

Lars and Shaine have returned to a quiet life on the islands in The Devil at Your Door. For Lars, though, there is unfinished business. Business that sees him enacting revenge on behalf of his protégé, the young woman he’s grown to think of as a daughter, in secret. But when he lands in the hospital, Shaine is called in from a thousand miles away and tasked with taking the lead on the last job of Lars’ storied career of death for hire. Together, they’ll face a local drug boss and an old enemy as they work to fire the last bullet they’ll ever need to—before one finds them first.
books.description: Lars & Shaine: The Complete Series by Eric Beetner follows hitman Lars from a job involving Mitch the Snitch into a dangerous bond with Shaine, with mobsters, the FBI, and old violence closing in around them.

books.title: Forbid Me Not
books.author: DV Fischer
books.blurb:
﻿Tab 1
Forbid Me Not
Book Blurb


COVER COPY / WEBSITE / INGRAM LISTING


I made an epic mistake. 
I slept with a hot stranger who looked at me like I wasn’t the thickest girl in the room—like I was wanted. Desired. Seen. It felt harmless. Healing, even. Until I found out he wasn’t a stranger at all. Nope. He was my brother’s best friend. Cool. Totally fine. Nothing to spiral about there.
Enter Reid Rathe. The man I absolutely should not want. The man who bulldozed straight through my vow to swear off men forever (courtesy of my emotionally destructive ex). I knew better than to fall for him. I knew better than to keep sneaking around with the one guy my brother has very clearly labeled off limits. But Reid doesn’t care about rules. He cares about me. He chases. He woos. He steals heated moments and whispers sweet things that lodge themselves in my heart.
And that’s the problem—falling for him would be so dang easy. He says I’m worth it. He says he’d risk everything. The question is… am I brave enough to risk it all for him?


AMAZON BLURB 


I made an epic mistake. 
I slept with a hot stranger who looked at me like I wasn’t the thickest girl in the room—like I was wanted. Desired. Seen. It felt harmless. Healing, even. Until I found out he wasn’t a stranger at all. Nope. He was my brother’s best friend. Cool. Totally fine. Nothing to spiral about there.
Enter Reid Rathe. The man I absolutely should not want. The man who bulldozed straight through my vow to swear off men forever (courtesy of my emotionally destructive ex). I knew better than to fall for him. I knew better than to keep sneaking around with the one guy my brother has very clearly labeled off limits. But Reid doesn’t care about rules. He cares about me. He chases. He woos. He steals heated moments and whispers sweet things that lodge themselves in my heart.
And that’s the problem—falling for him would be so dang easy. He says I’m worth it. He says he’d risk everything. The question is… am I brave enough to risk it all for him?
Forbid Me Not is a full-length, brother’s best friend, plus-sized romance packed with body-positive love, stolen moments, and all the messy, swoony feels.




COVER TAGLINE


He’s the one line I couldn’t help crossing.
books.description: Forbid Me Not by DV Fischer follows one epic mistake with a stranger. Enter Reid Rathe, the off-limits brother's best friend who keeps making the heroine feel desired, seen, and dangerously tempted.

books.title: Off the Menu
books.author: Lore Townsend
books.blurb:
﻿Tab 1
Off the Menu
(Off-Limits Lovers 1)
Book Blurb


COVER COPY / WEBSITE / INGRAM LISTING


He says I’m his good girl… but why does it feel like I’m his dirty little secret?


I came to this island for a clean slate. No drama. No distractions. Just a job, some sunshine, and a chance to finally get my life back on track.


Then I met him—my infuriating, devastatingly hot boss.
He’s older. Untouchable. Completely off-limits.
And somehow, I’m the one he can’t stay away from.


Behind closed doors, he’s all dominance and dirty promises. But in the daylight? He keeps me at arm’s length—and our relationship under wraps.


What starts as heat becomes something more…or at least, I think it does. But love doesn’t look like hiding. And secrets don’t feel like safety. So when the line between pleasure and pain starts to blur, I have to ask myself: Is this real—or am I just a beautiful, temporary escape?




AMAZON BLURB 


He says I’m his good girl… but why does it feel like I’m his dirty little secret?


I came to this island for a clean slate. No drama. No distractions. Just a job, some sunshine, and a chance to finally get my life back on track.


Then I met him—my infuriating, devastatingly hot boss.
He’s older. Untouchable. Completely off-limits.
And somehow, I’m the one he can’t stay away from.


Behind closed doors, he’s all dominance and dirty promises. But in the daylight? He keeps me at arm’s length—and our relationship under wraps.


What starts as heat becomes something more… or at least, I think it does.
But love doesn’t look like hiding. And secrets don’t feel like safety.
So when the line between pleasure and pain starts to blur, I have to ask myself:
Is this real—or am I just a beautiful, temporary escape?


Off the Menu is a steamy, emotional workplace romance set on a sun-drenched island where temptation is impossible to resist and love doesn’t follow the rules. Featuring a brooding alpha chef, a strong heroine, and five-star spice, this love story proves that sometimes, the most irresistible love is the one you were never supposed to find. Book your stay at the resort—and discover a love that breaks all the rules.


COVER TAGLINE


Some rules are made to be broken.
books.description: Off the Menu by Lore Townsend opens the Off-Limits Lovers series with an island clean slate, an untouchable man, and a behind-the-scenes secret that turns the job and the sunshine into temptation.

books.title: Vein & Vow
books.author: Nicole Jacquelyn
books.blurb:
﻿Vein & Vow
(The Bouchers Book 1)
Book Blurb


COVER COPY / WEBSITE / INGRAM LISTING
Fated mates? Too bad they can’t stand each other.
Reese Matthews doesn’t believe in fairy tales—especially not the kind that involve vampires and fated mates. She prefers her life simple: work, friends, and absolutely no supernatural drama. But when an infuriatingly gorgeous vampire strides into her job and sends her body into overdrive with a single glance, everything she thought she knew is turned upside down.
Beaumont Boucher has waited over a century to find his mate again. But this time, fate must have gotten it wrong. Reese is nothing like the woman he lost—the one he walked away from in another life. She’s sharp-tongued, stubborn, and completely unimpressed by his brooding vampire charm. He should leave her alone. But the bond between them is relentless… and the longer he stays away, the worse the craving gets.
While Beau fights the impossible pull toward Reese, his family is reeling from a devastating loss. As the Bouchers hunt for answers, darkness looms—and Reese is caught in the crossfire. With enemies closing in and their connection becoming impossible to ignore, Beau must decide: will he risk his heart—and Reese’s life—for a second chance at fate?
When destiny refuses to be denied, can two enemies find love in the ashes of a past they never shared?
AMAZON BLURB 
Fated mates? Too bad they can’t stand each other.
Reese Matthews doesn’t believe in fairy tales—especially not the kind that involve vampires and fated mates. She prefers her life simple: work, friends, and absolutely no supernatural drama. But when an infuriatingly gorgeous vampire strides into her job and sends her body into overdrive with a single glance, everything she thought she knew is turned upside down.
Beaumont Boucher has waited over a century to find his mate again. But this time, fate must have gotten it wrong. Reese is nothing like the woman he lost—the one he walked away from in another life. She’s sharp-tongued, stubborn, and completely unimpressed by his brooding vampire charm. He should leave her alone. But the bond between them is relentless… and the longer he stays away, the worse the craving gets.
While Beau fights the impossible pull toward Reese, his family is reeling from a devastating loss. As the Bouchers hunt for answers, darkness looms—and Reese is caught in the crossfire. With enemies closing in and their connection becoming impossible to ignore, Beau must decide: will he risk his heart—and Reese’s life—for a second chance at fate?
When destiny refuses to be denied, can two enemies find love in the ashes of a past they never shared?
Fans of J.R. Ward and Kresley Cole’s will devour this steamy paranormal romance filled with fated mates, forced proximity, broody vampires, and enemies-to-lovers tension. Get your copy today!


COVER TAGLINE
A fated bond with a deadly price.
books.description: Vein & Vow by Nicole Jacquelyn brings Reese Matthews and Beaumont Boucher into a fated-mates paranormal romance where a stubborn bond, the Bouchers, and looming darkness make desire impossible to ignore.

books.title: Combustible
books.author: Hunter Shea
books.blurb:
Combustible

Book Blurb

COVER COPY / WEBSITE / INGRAM LISTING

Post-Apocalyptic Horror meets Thriller in a Dystopian Nightmare of Fire and Ash.

The world didn’t end with a bang or a whimper…it ended with people bursting into flames.

Across the globe, spontaneous human combustion (SHC) is turning ordinary citizens into living infernos. Governments collapse, cities fall silent, and the air itself tastes like ash. Society burns while the lucky few are left to wonder: When will it be me?

Sam and Aja were already falling apart before the fires came. Now, trapped in a crumbling apartment and suffocating under the weight of isolation, their love feels just as doomed as the rest of humanity. But when whispers spread of a small Canadian town called Consumption, untouched by the inferno, hope flickers.

Stealing an RV and refusing to leave Aja behind, Sam sets out on a desperate, ash-streaked journey through a burned-out North America. With his best friend in tow and a growing crew of strange, unforgettable survivors, they chase rumors through a landscape warped by horror, madness, and the heat of human combustion.

Perfect for fans of The Gone-Away World by Nick Harkaway and Warm Bodies by Isaac Marion, Combustible is a harrowing, darkly tender exploration of what survives when everything else burns. Will love endure in a world destined to ignite?

AMAZON BLURB

Post-Apocalyptic Horror meets Thriller in a Dystopian Nightmare of Fire and Ash.

The world didn’t end with a bang or a whimper—it ended with people bursting into flames.

Across the globe, spontaneous human combustion (SHC) is turning ordinary citizens into living infernos. Governments collapse, cities fall silent, and the air itself tastes like ash. Society burns while the lucky few are left to wonder: When will it be me?

Sam and Aja were already falling apart before the fires came. Now, trapped in a crumbling apartment and suffocating under the weight of isolation, their love feels just as doomed as the rest of humanity. But when whispers spread of a small Canadian town called “Consumption”, untouched by the inferno, hope flickers.

Stealing an RV and refusing to leave Aja behind, Sam sets out on a desperate, ash-streaked journey through a burned-out North America. With his best friend in tow and a growing crew of strange, unforgettable survivors, they chase rumors through a landscape warped by horror, madness, and the heat of human combustion.

Perfect for fans of The Gone-Away World by Nick Harkaway and Warm Bodies by Isaac Marion, Combustible is a harrowing, darkly tender exploration of what survives when everything else burns. Will love endure in a world destined to ignite? Grab your copy now—before it goes up in smoke.

COVER TAGLINE

“Combustible is explosive! A hot new take on the end of the world.” —Brian Keene, author of The Complex

Original from author

The End No One Saw Coming - An outbreak of spontaneous human combustion (SHC) has mankind teetering on the edge of extinction. People are going up in flames from every corner of the globe. Panic has led to lockdowns and the complete breakdown of society, but there is no escaping the inevitable.

Love in the Time of the Apocalypse - Sam and Aja watched their marriage implode just as everyone around them was going up in smoke. Forced to sequester in their small apartment, tempers flare hotter than a crematorium. The SHC pandemic and forced proximity has only made things worse. Waiting for the end seems a better alternative than waking up to another day.

Hope in the Great White North - Rumor has it that there’s a Canadian town called Consumption that is free from cases of SHC. Sam steals an RV, refusing to leave his estranged wife behind. Along with his best friend, they embark on a road trip through a vast and weird wasteland, picking up an odd cast of characters along the way. Will they find salvation? Can the flickering flame of love be rekindled amidst a planet on fire? When it’s your last rodeo, hang on for dear life and ride it out. The end of the world was never so strange
books.description: Combustible by Hunter Shea ignites a post-apocalyptic nightmare where spontaneous human combustion leaves Sam and Aja chasing rumors of a safe Canadian town called Consumption through a world of ash.

books.title: Revelations: The Complete Trilogy
books.author: Terry James
books.blurb_source: gdrive://1wtGLPSwHtn-3XXdUlW4DgY9EU0BRva35/Book Blurb -- Revelations The Complete Trilogy by Terry James.docx
books.blurb:
Revelations: The Complete Trilogy

Book Blurb

A gripping series full of biblical prophecies and apocalyptic visions.

In Revelations, Tyce Greyson—a TV journalist and reporter—becomes interested in Bible prophecy after having an experience at the Wailing Wall. When he gets a new job as an anchor in New York City, he starts having episodes that bring on visions and begins making predictions that come true.

Tyce is shown a strange golden sarcophagus after getting into a car accident in Michael: Last Days Lightning. Learning that it’s part of a project the Israeli government wants him to participate in, Tyce is assigned to investigate the mysterious archaeological find—while also unearthing the globalists' true plan.

During Messiah: And the Prince Who Shall Come, Tyce is tasked with finding Israel’s Messiah by a rabbinic council. But it quickly becomes clear these would-be world masters have catastrophic plans to bring everyone under their control. Will Tyce be successful on his mission to forewarn Israelites of the one who will deceive them?

Follow along as a man of destiny is commissioned to carry forward Heaven’s countervailing measures—getting caught up in apocalyptic visions in which dangers confront him at every juncture.

books.title: Wild Cow Ranch: The Complete Series
books.author: Natalie Bright, Denise F McAllister
books.blurb_source: gdrive://1sYcEgMwoXuAemqHZ2fJdiVK3pCQbQrH6/Book Blurb: Wild Cow Ranch: The Complete Series.docx
books.blurb:
Welcome to Dixon, Texas—where your heart’s deepest desires come true. From horse shows to crime and sweet cowboy romance, readers are sure to be taken on six separate journeys of courage and finding faith.

Maverick HeartWhen Carli Jameson inherits a Texas cattle ranch from a grandfather she never knew, she hopes that a fresh start will erase the troubles of her past. But should she give up her beloved Georgia for a life in the dusty, treeless Texas Panhandle? Too bad the irritating ranch hand isn’t making her decision any easier.A Wild Cow Winter

Broken by a storm, fate has taken a turn for the worse for Carli. Hungry, freezing, and full of doubt, she must rely on her growing faith to believe that she'll make it out alive. But if she survives, can she finally trust that new beginnings are possible?Follow A Wild HeartManaging her new obligations as ranch owner would be easier for Carli if she didn’t have to confront the Texas cowboys who keep crossing her path. After all, there’s no time for romance when there’s a cattle operation to run. Too bad her heart isn’t listening.Cowgirls and RustlersSmall-town crime and tough cowgirls collide when Carli Jameson and her neighbor, Angie Olsen, take on a group of cattle rustlers. Working together to save not only their own ranches, but also the livelihoods of the town’s people, they lean on friendships and God.A Wild Cow WeddingNow that Carli has settled on her man, can he get her down the aisle? As the town of Dixon, Texas comes together to plan the wedding of the century, the bride-to-be’s anxieties become overwhelming. It doesn’t help that there’s a new claim on her beloved Wild Cow Ranch. Will something once meant so little to Carli—but is now her whole heart—be ripped away forever?Wild Cow ChristmasSometimes the quietest moments are the loudest in your heart, and Carli is dead set on bringing back the Christmas traditions her grandparents set for the entire town of Dixon. But with her time being torn between various commitments, she isn’t sure she can pull it off.

This exciting six-book heartfelt Christian cowboy romance collection will have you reading all through the night and dreaming of life on a ranch. So, scroll on up and click Read for Free or Buy now with 1-Click and discover your new favorite irresistible cowboy series today!
books.description: Wild Cow Ranch: The Complete Series by Natalie Bright and Denise F McAllister gathers a Christian story world shaped by faith, redemption, and prayer, where broken hearts and tested spirits move toward grace without losing the grit of Western life.

books.title: The Abilene Kid: Dead Man's Hand
books.author: John V Madormo
books.blurb:
The Abilene Kid Series: Volume OneBook Blurb

WEBSITE / AMAZON

Step into the saddle and ride headlong into danger, destiny, and the dusty streets of 1888 Abilene, Kansas—where history isn’t just studied…it’s survived.

Twelve-year-old Dominick Dalesandro is obsessed with the Wild West. But when a mysterious library book hurls him back through time, he becomes Pete Moss, deputy to legendary lawman Amos Malone. What starts as a dream adventure quickly spirals into a perilous mission to rewrite fate and protect the people Pete has come to love.

In Dead Man’s Hand, Pete discovers the sheriff’s death is only weeks away—and he may be the only one who can stop it.

In Boot Hill Curse, secrets run deeper than the graves, and someone in town will do anything to keep the truth buried.

In Sacred Relics, a war brews between settlers and the Cheyenne as stolen artifacts ignite betrayal—and a ruthless outlaw returns.

In Sweet Revenge, an escaped convict’s vendetta threatens the town, the sheriff’s new bride, and the very timeline itself.

Gunfights, buried secrets, stolen history, and impossible choices—The Abilene Kid Series: Volume One is a gripping four-book collection packed with nonstop action, heart, and a young hero who won’t back down, no matter the century.

Perfect for fans of YA Westerns, time-travel adventures, and heroic coming-of-age tales.

COVER TAGLINE

History is no longer just a subject…it’s a world he must survive.
books.description: The Abilene Kid: Dead Man's Hand by John V Madormo sends twelve-year-old Dominick Dalesandro back to 1888 Abilene, Kansas as Pete Moss, deputy to Amos Malone, with the sheriff's death closing in.

books.title: The Liars Beneath
books.author: Heather Van Fleet
books.blurb:
The Liars Beneath

Book Blurb

A romantically dark YA thriller set in the backdrop of Iowa’s suspenseful farmlands.

After a tragic accident ends her best friend’s life, 17-year-old Becca Thompson succumbs to grief the only way she knows how: by wallowing in it. She’s a fragment of the person she once was—far too broken to enjoy the summer before her senior year. But when Ben McCain, her best friend’s older brother, returns home, Becca must face her new reality head on.She isn’t interested in Ben’s games, especially since he abandoned his sister during the months leading up to her death. But when he begs for her help in uncovering the truth about what really happened the night of his sister’s death, Becca finds herself agreeing, hoping to clear up rumors swirling in the wake of her best friend's accident.An unhinged ex-boyfriend, secret bucket lists, and garage parties in the place Becca calls home soon lead her to the answers she’s so desperate to unveil. But nobody is being honest, not even Ben. And the closer Becca gets to the truth—and to Ben—the more danger seems to surround her.Clearing her best friend’s name was all she wanted to do, but Becca is quickly realizing that the truth she craves might be uglier than the lies her best friend kept.

Tagline: Sometimes the truth is uglier than the lie.

Quotes to use in social media

“Some called it suicide. Others called it an accident. But not a single person said it was preventable.”

A romantically dark YA thriller set in the backdrop of Iowa’s suspenseful farmlands.

After a tragic accident ends her best friend’s life, 17-year-old Becca Thompson succumbs to her grief the only way she knows how: by wallowing in it. Unfortunately, secrets keep exposing themselves when it comes to Rose’s life and dangerous people from Becca’s past are being their best to keep those secrets hidden.

Dark, twisty, and sometimes ugly, this book isn’t for the faint of heart.

books.title: Card Jordan Volume One: Books 1-5
books.author: Monty R Garner
books.blurb:
VENGEANCE FORGED HIM. DUTY DEFINED HIM. LEGEND MADE HIM.

From the blood-stained plains of Texas to the lawless edges of Indian Territory, Card Jordan's rise from heartbroken boy to hardened lawman unfolds in five gripping Western adventures.

When sixteen-year-old Card returns home to find his family murdered and a taunting message carved into the dirt--CARD, KILL THEM ALL--his quest for vengeance sets him on a path he can never turn back from. Across these first five novels, Card hunts killers, rescues the innocent, uncovers conspiracy at the highest levels, battles rustlers threatening his land, and confronts outlaws who push the limits of justice and honor.

But every fight carries a cost. Every choice carves deeper into the man he's becoming.

Perfect for fans of Louis L'Amour and classic frontier justice, Card Jordan: Volume One includes the first five novels in the Card Jordan saga. Stories of grit, high-stakes action, and a gunslinger who refuses to back down, no matter the odds.
books.description: Card Jordan Volume One: Books 1-5 by Monty R Garner follows a Texas boy forged by family murder into a hardened lawman, hunting killers across Indian Territory while conspiracy, rustlers, and frontier justice carve him into a legend.

books.title: To Face a Savage Land
books.author: John Legg
books.blurb:
Hawley Cooper is left alone to die by Josiah Weeks, with no food or weapons in the middle of winter in the Rocky Mountains. Just six months ago, Cooper was a youth on the edge of manhood, one looking for adventure. Now he wonders if he will live long enough to become a man. With a few items he had hidden-a bit of pemmican, a few strips of jerky, two shards of flint, and his penknife-he heads off into the teeth of winter.

When he goes down under the weight of an attack by a pack of wolves, he figures his time has come... until he awakes in a Shoshone lodge. Nursed back to health, it is time for him to become a man, and keep the vow he had made while fighting for survival-kill Josiah Weeks.
books.description: To Face a Savage Land by John Legg strands young Hawley Cooper in a Rocky Mountains winter after Josiah Weeks leaves him with no food or weapons, forcing a fight for survival, Shoshone refuge, and a vow of revenge.

books.title: Willow Falls
books.author: Ken Pratt
books.blurb:
Welcome to Willow Falls. The town young Matthew Bannister ran away from fifteen years before. Now famed U.S. Deputy Marshal Matt Bannister is coming home to reconcile with his family. He prayed he wouldn't see his ex-best friend Tom Smith nor the only girl he ever loved, Tom's wife, Elizabeth. However, old feuds unsettled never die and spark a powder keg of action when the desperate Moskin Gang kidnap Elizabeth and leave a murderous trail behind them.

In anguish, Tom, the Willow Falls sheriff, turns to his despised old-friend to help get the woman they both love back alive, if they can.

Sometimes God's greatest blessing is unanswered prayer.
books.description: Willow Falls by Ken Pratt brings U.S. Deputy Marshal Matt Bannister back to the town he fled, where Tom Smith, Elizabeth, and the Moskin Gang turn old wounds into a rescue fight shadowed by unanswered prayer.

books.title: Lonnie Gentry and the Curse of Skull Canyon
books.author: Peter Brandvold
books.blurb:
Western action and adventure author Peter Brandvold's iconic Lonnie Gentry series comes together like a stick of dynamite and a match to blow readers away!

In book one, Lonnie Gentry, life has not been easy for young cowboy Lonnie Gentry. He and his mother live alone, working hard on their remote Colorado mountain ranch. Now the thirteen-year-old must travel over perilous mountains to return money stolen by his mother's outlaw boyfriend. It's a man's job. And it's going to take a man - and the woman the man loves - to see it through.

In The Curse of Skull Canyon, everyone in the Never Summer Mountains knows about the ancient Indian curse on Skull Canyon in the highest, remotest reaches of the range, not far from the ranch young Lonnie Gentry shares with his mother and infant half-brother.

When a man's agonized wail lures him into the canyon, he finds a youth only a few years older than himself dying from a gunshot wound. Later, when savage men pour into the remote canyon, apparently searching for something they're willing to kill for, Lonnie learns the extent of Skull Canyon's horror.

Saddle up for high-stakes drama, rugged landscapes, and the unforgettable grit of a boy growing into a man. Will Lonnie survive the trials of the West--or be swallowed by its shadows?
books.description: Lonnie Gentry and the Curse of Skull Canyon by Peter Brandvold follows young Lonnie from a remote Colorado ranch into the Never Summer Mountains, where stolen money, an ancient Indian curse, and killers test a boy becoming a man.
anchors_extracted: In The Curse of Skull Canyon
